system.description: A dual-natured investigator with human and beast forms. Skills change based on form. Keen senses and natural ferocity make this archetype excellent for combat roles.

power.name: Keen Senses
power.description: In beast form, gain +2 dice to Contact-based perception rolls. Track targets by scent over vast distances.

characteristics.text: Cannot control transformation during full moon

secondaryPower.name: Ferocity
secondaryPower.description: In beast form, add +2 dice to Athletics-based attacks. Ignore pain thresholds.
